name: China Public Procurement Limited
summary: China Public Procurement Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of various products in the People's Republic of China. It operates through four segments: Public Procurement, Trading Business, Provision of Corporate IT Solution, and Rental Income. The company's activities also include the development and operation of electronic public procurement platforms; and provision of procurement information and other added value services, including supplier authentication, financial services, supply chain management, etc., as well as provision of public procurement services to users of the procurement platforms. It also develops software and provides maintenance services to its customers in Wuhan, Hubei Province. The company was formerly known as Sunny Global Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Public Procurement Limited in May 2009. China Public Procurement Limited is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
